zh.lifeSummary: Alice Preste是William Preste的女兒，於1305年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾伯頓 拉札斯。她於1320年與Sir. John de Woodford在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1333年在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷享年28歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Alice Preste是William Preste的女儿，于1305年出生在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾伯頓 拉札斯。她于1320年与Sir. John de Woodford在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1333年在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷享年28岁。

nameMeanings.name: Preste
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Sal, Pasquale, Biagio, Carmello, Carmelo, Francesco, Gasper, Giovanni, Nino, Rocco.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of   Presto  . Compare   Lo Presti  .

variants.name: Presto
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Salvatore, Liberato, Carmelo, Carmine, Domenic, Fiore, Mario, Ofelia, Orlando, Pietro.  Spanish Juan, Agustin, Epifanio, Josefina, Ramon.

Italian (southern, mainly Calabria and Sicily): occupational name for someone in the service of a priest, or perhaps for someone suspected of being the son of a priest, from southern Italian presto ‘priest’, from Old French prestre. Compare Lo Presto .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: Alice Preste was born in 1305, in Burton Lazars, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of William Preste. She married Sir. John de Woodford in 1320, in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1333, in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 28.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Presteは1305年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアブルトン ラザルズでWilliam Presteの娘として生まれた。1320年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアメルトン モウブレイでSir. John de Woodfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1333年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアメルトン モウブレイで28歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Preste(은)는 1305년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 버턴 라자르스에서 William Preste의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1320년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 멜턴 모우브라이에서 Sir. John de Woodford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1333년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 멜턴 모우브라이에서 28세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Alice Preste родилась в 1305 г. в местности буртон лазарс, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали William Preste. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir. John de Woodford в 1320 г. в местности мелтон мавбрэи, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1333 г. в местности мелтон мавбрэи, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 28 лет.
